name: Crab-And-Pink Grapefruit Salad
recipeIngredient: picked over to remove bits of cartilage
recipeInstructions:
GRAPEFRUIT DRESSING
2 tablespoons grated grapefruit peel
1 shallot, minced
1 tablespoon white wine vinegar
1 tablespoon balsamic vinegar
1/2 teaspoon salt
1/2 cup olive oil
SEPARATE LETTUCE LEAVES, using only the best ones.
Arrange a bed of lettuce on 6 individual serving dishes.
Evenly distribute grapefruit sections and crab meat over lettuce,
arranging attractively. Drizzle about 1 tablespoon Grapefruit Dressing
over each serving.
GRAPEFRUIT DRESSING: In a small bowl, combine grapefruit peel, shallot,
white wine vinegar, balsamic vinegar, and salt. Whisk in olive oil slowly.
Taste for acid and salt; add more if too bland. Stir to blend before using.
